statusLine.command: input=$(cat); full_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir=$(basename "$full_dir"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); git_info=''; if cd "$full_dir" 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -c core.fileMode=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); status=$(git -c core.fileMode=false status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$status" ]; then modified=$(echo "$status" | grep -c '^ M' || true); added=$(echo "$status" | grep -c '^A' || true); deleted=$(echo "$status" | grep -c '^D' || true); untracked=$(echo "$status" | grep -c '^??' || true); status_symbols=''; [ "$modified" -gt 0 ] && status_symbols="${status_symbols}M:${modified} "; [ "$added" -gt 0 ] && status_symbols="${status_symbols}A:${added} "; [ "$deleted" -gt 0 ] && status_symbols="${status_symbols}D:${deleted} "; [ "$untracked" -gt 0 ] && status_symbols="${status_symbols}?:${untracked} "; git_info=" [git:${branch} ${status_symbols% }]"; else git_info=" [git:${branch}]"; fi; fi; context_info=''; [ -n "$remaining" ] && context_info=" | Context: ${remaining}% remaining"; printf "%s%s | %s%s" "$dir" "$git_info" "$model" "$context_info"

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'
